description_long: This is a modern claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a contoured handle. The head is silver-gray, with a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw for nail removal on the other. The handle is predominantly red with black ergonomic grip accents, designed for comfort and slip resistance. The handle appears to be made of a composite material, likely fiberglass or reinforced plastic, with a rubberized grip for enhanced control. The hammer is compact and well-balanced, suitable for a variety of construction or repair tasks in urban environments. No visible branding, wear, or accessories are present.
description: A modern claw hammer with a silver metallic head and a red-and-black ergonomic handle, featuring a curved claw for nail removal and a textured grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, highlighting the red and black ergonomic handle and the silver claw head.
description_view_1: Front view showing the narrow profile of the hammer's head and the alignment of the handle behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the handle's contours and the claw head, with the handle's color pattern visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the split claw of the hammer head and the end of the handle, emphasizing the grip's width and texture.
attribute_handle_type: Ergonomic fiberglass handle with a red and black rubberized textured grip, slightly contoured for comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head made of steel, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
